steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage emphasizes that the deltaic system is where “the river mixes with the sea” and materials constantly exchange—a junction between two distinct water bodies.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content:
”Interface between” directly expresses this meeting point: it names a boundary where two systems meet and interact.

The alternatives don't capture this relationship: “accordance between” implies agreement, “predecessor of” creates a grammatical mismatch, and “confines of” suggests an enclosed space rather than a juncture.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
